items.markdown:
Halotherapy (dry salt therapy) requires a **halogenerator** to micronize pure sodium chloride into microparticles for inhalation. For a spa environment, equipment ranges from standalone halogenerators for custom salt rooms to all-in-one booths and specialized treatment tables.[[1]](https://halogenerator.net/halotherapy-machine#:~:text=Without%20Halogenerator%20there%20is%20no,ones%20fall%20to%20the%20floor.)[[2]](https://newsandviews.aacvpr.org/Full-Article/halotherapy-a-breath-of-salty-air-1#:~:text=The%20therapy%20uses%20a%20piece,aerosol%20into%20a%20treatment%20space.)[[3]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions%2C%20founded%20eight%20years,sessions%20and%20treating%20skin%20conditions.)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://purespadirect.com/collections/touch-america-spa-and-wellness-innovations#:~:text=The%20brand's%20diverse%20product%20range%20caters%20to,designed%20for%20those%20seeking%20holistic%20wellness%20experiences.)

Professional Halogenerators[[1]](https://www.prizma.rs/media/wysiwyg/manual/PRIZMA-Halotherapy-Medica-2024.pdf#:~:text=We%20encourage%20you%20to%20make%20salt%20therapy,be%20provided%20by%20utilizing%20a%20professional-quality%20halogenerator.)

The halogenerator is the core component that grinds and disperses medical-grade salt.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Halogenerator-SALT1-Halotherapy-Home-SPA/dp/B0C6NLHNGV#:~:text=About%20this%20Item,-%20one-year%20global%20warranty.)[[2]](https://www.halogenerators.com/#:~:text=What%20is%20a%20Halogenerator?,caves%2C%20and%20chambers%20are%20alike.)

- **[HaloGX Pro](https://www.homehalotherapy.com/products/halogx-pro)** : Designed by **Halotherapy Solutions** for mid-sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., it uses hybrid mill and cyclone technology for ultra-fine particle dispersion.
- **[[HALO FX Halogenerator](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:3504973546728682072,headlineOfferDocid:14641830832978133593,productDocid:14641830832978133593&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjmntvT16KTAxX4mGoFHbxdIbQQxa4PegQIBRAH) ](https://himalayansource.com/products/halo-fx%E2%84%A2-halogenerator-1)** : Offered by **Himalayan Source** , this unit is customizable for specific skin or lung conditions and is virtually maintenance-free.
- **[SALT FX Pro](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/products/halogenerators)** : A high-capacity model from **SALT Chamber** built for larger salt rooms between 100–400 sq. ft..
- **[[HaloMini Halogenerator](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:7070652220850567409,headlineOfferDocid:3016626863907096797,productDocid:3016626863907096797&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjmntvT16KTAxX4mGoFHbxdIbQQxa4PegQIBRAP) ](https://himalayansource.com/products/halomini-halogenerator)** : A compact, quiet option for small cabins up to 50 sq. ft. that uses less salt while maintaining efficacy.[[1]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/halogenerator-for-salt-booths-and-cabins/#:~:text=Ideal%20for%20a%20smaller%20salt,our%20proprietary%20SaltPerfect%E2%84%A2%20technology)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8680499957770102009,catalogid:17910916059365096227,gpcid:15136280251442428962,mid:576462848478474322&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14641830832978133593&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/products/halogenerators#:~:text=SALT%20FX%C2%AE%20Pro,the%20lowest%20cost%20of%20entry.)[[5]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/products/halogenerators)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3016626863907096797&ibp=oshop)

Integrated Salt Booths & Saunas[[1]](https://www.saluwellness.com/halotherapy)

These self-contained units allow spas to offer halotherapy without building a dedicated room.[[1]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/ourproducts/#:~:text=LARGEST%20SELECTION,Portable%20Salt%20Therapy)[[2]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions%2C%20founded%20eight%20years,sessions%20and%20treating%20skin%20conditions.)[[3]](https://klafs.co.uk/news-press/press-releases/detail/a-guide-to-salt-room-therapy#:~:text=If%20you%20have%20a%20home%20sauna%2C%20you,space%20without%20installing%20a%20dedicated%20salt%20room.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/spa-treatments-to-pair-with-halotherapy-treatment#:~:text=Integrating%20facial%20treatments%20with%20halotherapy%20often%20provided,and%20creating%20new%20opportunities%20for%20enhanced%20care.)[[5]](https://www.salttherapyassociation.org/blog/distinguishing-halotherapy-and-commercial-halogenerators-there-is-no-such-thing-as-an-instant-salt-room-85#:~:text=Likewise%2C%20many%20facilities%20are%20incorporating%20halogenerators%20on,are%20self-enclosed%20spaces%20that%20provide%20effective%20halotherapy.)

[![HaloSTAR Halotherapy Booth](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03152155-4353-0139-0000-1b3e3bb476db:6)
HaloSTAR Halotherapy Booth $9,900.00 Universal Companies](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16782830647690521193,headlineOfferDocid:10680378767736738884,productDocid:10680378767736738884&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjmntvT16KTAxX4mGoFHbxdIbQQgLcPegQICRAC) Ask about A wooden booth featuring backlit salt bricks, medical-grade chromotherapy, and a built-in HaloGX halogenerator.

[![Halo-IR Halotherapy and Infrared Sauna](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03152155-4353-0139-0000-1b3e3bb476db:7)
Halo-IR Halotherapy and Infrared Sauna $12,900.00 Universal Companies](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10429495114561271530,headlineOfferDocid:17570804696637976226,productDocid:17570804696637976226&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjmntvT16KTAxX4mGoFHbxdIbQQgLcPegQICRAM) Ask about A "4-in-1" unit from **Universal Companies** that combines halotherapy with far-infrared heat, aromatherapy, and chromotherapy.

A specialized chamber that merges halotherapy with red light therapy for enhanced wellness benefits.[[1]](https://esteamedsaunas.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions?srsltid=AfmBOorXmiH6XjqI6F4mcT4PzXjLV-Nd5RROZWNbGH8KMFmHCRRQPxJ2#:~:text=Collection:%20Halotherapy%20Solutions,to%20advancing%20holistic%20health%20practices.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10680378767736738884&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10694323843935424057&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17570804696637976226&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions%2C%20founded%20eight%20years,sessions%20and%20treating%20skin%20conditions.)

Salt Treatment Tables

Specialized tables allow therapists to combine salt therapy with massage or body treatments.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://mfa.gov.by/fckeditor/editor/filemanager/browser/default/browser.html?Type=File&GetFoldersAndFiles=4D96DE0EC6&id=iiwiaugjacf&CONNECTOR=%2F%5C%2Fmg6.pics%2F79%2F#:~:text=Q:%20Who%20is%20this%20table%20ideal%20for?,a%20flexible%2C%20comfortable%20table%20for%20various%20treatments.)

[![Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica Black / Flex-Block](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03152155-4353-0139-0000-1b3e3bb476db:8)
Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica Black / Flex-Block $15,890.00 Pure Spa Direct](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:12865283134943884178,headlineOfferDocid:11460056596760300396,productDocid:11460056596760300396&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjmntvT16KTAxX4mGoFHbxdIbQQgLcPegQIDBAC) Ask about Produced by **TouchAmerica** , this table features heated Himalayan salt blocks for direct skin contact and can be converted into a traditional massage table.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11460056596760300396&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://chairsthatgive.com/products/touch-america-atlas-flex-block-halotherapy-salt-table#:~:text=TouchAmerica%20Atlas%20Flex-Block%E2%84%A2%20&%20ION%20Salt%20Table,350%20lbs.%20Static%20weight%20capacity%201000%20lbs.)[[4]](https://www.saltability.com/blogs/press-releases/new-himalayan-salt-lounge-chair-offers-unique-boost-for-spa-guests-health#:~:text=The%20Atlas%20Flex-Block%20Salt%20Lounge%20builds%20on,problems%2C%20decrease%20anxiety%2C%20improve%20sleep%20and%20more.)

Major Equipment Suppliers

- **[Halotherapy Solutions](https://halotherapysolutions.com/about-us/)** : Recognized as the largest global provider, offering everything from portable "HaloPockets" to custom salt rooms.
- **[SALT Chamber Inc.](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/)** : A pioneer in the industry since 2012, providing ISO-certified halogenerators and comprehensive spa packages.
- **[HaloSpa USA](https://halospausa.com/)** : Specializes in controlled halotherapy with sensors that monitor salt concentration levels in real-time.[[1]](https://halospausa.com/#:~:text=Effective%20salt%20therapy%20starts%20with,aerosol%20throughout%20the%20salt%20room.)[[2]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/about-us/#:~:text=About%20Halotherapy%20Solutions,respiratory%20health%2C%20hygiene%20and%20immunity.)[[3]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/contact-us/#:~:text=International%20Sales%20&%20Support,here%20to%20support%20your%20success.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/#:~:text=%E2%80%8DHalogenerators?,%2C%20and%20user-friendly%20manuals.)[[5]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/#:~:text=%E2%80%8DHalogenerators?,%2C%20and%20user-friendly%20manuals.)[[6]](http://www.halomedsaltroom.com/index.php/en/halomed-halogenerator/solutions-for-everyone/halogenerator-for-spa-and-wellness#:~:text=HaloSPA-03%20%28new%20brand%20of,designed%20for%20small%20salt%20rooms.)

Would you like more information on **ventilation requirements** for a custom salt room or details on **financing options** for these systems?

items.title: Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica Black / Flex-Block

items.text: Produced by TouchAmerica, this table features heated Himalayan salt blocks for direct skin contact and can be converted into a traditional massage table.
items.markdown: Produced by **TouchAmerica** , this table features heated Himalayan salt blocks for direct skin contact and can be converted into a traditional massage table.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11460056596760300396&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://chairsthatgive.com/products/touch-america-atlas-flex-block-halotherapy-salt-table#:~:text=TouchAmerica%20Atlas%20Flex-Block%E2%84%A2%20&%20ION%20Salt%20Table,350%20lbs.%20Static%20weight%20capacity%201000%20lbs.)[[4]](https://www.saltability.com/blogs/press-releases/new-himalayan-salt-lounge-chair-offers-unique-boost-for-spa-guests-health#:~:text=The%20Atlas%20Flex-Block%20Salt%20Lounge%20builds%20on,problems%2C%20decrease%20anxiety%2C%20improve%20sleep%20and%20more.)

items.title: Major Equipment Suppliers
items.text: Halotherapy Solutions : Recognized as the largest global provider, offering everything from portable "HaloPockets" to custom salt rooms. SALT Chamber Inc. : A pioneer in the industry since 2012, providing ISO-certified halogenerators and comprehensive spa packages. HaloSpa USA : Specializes in controlled halotherapy with sensors that monitor salt concentration levels in real-time.
items.markdown:
- **[Halotherapy Solutions](https://halotherapysolutions.com/about-us/)** : Recognized as the largest global provider, offering everything from portable "HaloPockets" to custom salt rooms.
- **[SALT Chamber Inc.](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/)** : A pioneer in the industry since 2012, providing ISO-certified halogenerators and comprehensive spa packages.
- **[HaloSpa USA](https://halospausa.com/)** : Specializes in controlled halotherapy with sensors that monitor salt concentration levels in real-time.[[1]](https://halospausa.com/#:~:text=Effective%20salt%20therapy%20starts%20with,aerosol%20throughout%20the%20salt%20room.)[[2]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/about-us/#:~:text=About%20Halotherapy%20Solutions,respiratory%20health%2C%20hygiene%20and%20immunity.)[[3]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/contact-us/#:~:text=International%20Sales%20&%20Support,here%20to%20support%20your%20success.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/#:~:text=%E2%80%8DHalogenerators?,%2C%20and%20user-friendly%20manuals.)[[5]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/#:~:text=%E2%80%8DHalogenerators?,%2C%20and%20user-friendly%20manuals.)[[6]](http://www.halomedsaltroom.com/index.php/en/halomed-halogenerator/solutions-for-everyone/halogenerator-for-spa-and-wellness#:~:text=HaloSPA-03%20%28new%20brand%20of,designed%20for%20small%20salt%20rooms.)
